scripts.dev: tmux has-session -t dev 2>/dev/null || tmux new-session -d -s dev 'npm run dev:foreground'
scripts.dev:foreground: spacetime start & sleep 5 && spacetime publish -y && spacetime dev
scripts.tunnel: tmux has-session -t tunnel 2>/dev/null || tmux new-session -d -s tunnel 'npm run tunnel:foreground'
scripts.reset: kill $(pgrep -f spacetime) 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; spacetime server clear -y; spacetime logout
scripts.deploy: sh -c 'BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current); if [ "$BRANCH" = "main" ]; then npm run deploy:prod; elif [ "$BRANCH" = "preview" ]; then npm run deploy:staging; else echo "Deploy requires main (prod) or preview (staging) branch. Current: $BRANCH"; exit 1; fi'
scripts.deploy:staging: sh -c '[ "$(git branch --show-current)" = "preview" ] && spacetime publish --env staging -y && npm run deploy:preview -w client || (echo "Deploy to staging requires preview branch"; exit 1)'
scripts.deploy:prod: sh -c '[ "$(git branch --show-current)" = "main" ] && spacetime publish --env prod -y && npm run deploy:prod -w client || (echo "Deploy to prod requires main branch"; exit 1)'
